name: accent_dot_ordinal

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.21 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] #331 ordinal selector 「Nつめの」. Counting is case-insensitive over the reclaimed run Sisa — the capital S is occurrence 1, the lowercase s is 2 — so 「２つめのs」 dots the lowercase s → Siṣa. The counted position must itself be composable.

source: Sisa［＃２つめのsは下ドット付き］

expected.serialize: Sisa［＃２つめのsは下ドット付き］
